zh.lifeSummary: 當Hervey Bagot II於大約1154年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾時，他的父親Hervey Bagot11152歲，母親Avis FitzRichard de Clare31歲。他和Millicent de Stafford至少有2個兒子。他去世於1214年在英國斯塔福爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a Breton personal name composed of haer ‘battle’ + vy ‘worthy’. It was introduced to Britain by Bretons who settled in East Anglia and elsewhere in the wake of the Norman Conquest.

en.lifeSummary: When Hervey Bagot II was born about 1154, in Bramshall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey Bagot, was 11152 and his mother, Avis FitzRichard de Clare, was 31. He had at least 2 sons with Millicent de Stafford. He died in 1214, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hervey Bagot II est né environ 1154, à Bramshall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey Bagot, avait 11152 ans et sa mère, Avis FitzRichard de Clare, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Millicent de Stafford. Il est décédé en 1214, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stafford Castle, Staffordshire, England: Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hervey Bagot II um 1154 in Bramshall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervey Bagot 11152 und seine Mutter Avis FitzRichard de Clare 31. Er hatte mit Millicent de Stafford mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1214 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Staffordshire, England und wurde in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Millicent de Stafford. Morì nel 1214, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Stone, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Bramshall, Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Eng: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブラムシャル
ja.lifeSummary: Hervey Bagot IIが約1154年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブラムシャルで生まれた時，父Hervey Bagotは11152歳，母Avis FitzRichard de Clareは31歳であった。彼はMillicent de Staffordとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1214年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hervey Bagot II(이)가 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브램샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey Bagot(은)는 11152세였고, 그의 어머니 Avis FitzRichard de Clare(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Millicent de Stafford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1214년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hervey Bagot II nasceu aproximadamente 1154, em Bramshall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hervey Bagot, tinha 11152 anos e sua mãe, Avis FitzRichard de Clare, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Millicent de Stafford. Ele faleceu em 1214, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Stone, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Stafford Castle, Staffordshire, England: Castle Church, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hervey Bagot II родился около 1154 г. в местности брамшолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey Bagot было 11152 года, а матери, которую звали Avis FitzRichard de Clare, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Millicent de Stafford. Он умер в 1214 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
